# Days

Description: When events are regularly spread across multiple days, with pauses in the action each day or night.  Eventful days are mostly consecutive with few breaks.
Inspirations: In the Mouth of Madness (../Inspirations/In%20the%20Mouth%20of%20Madness%203a3a45e2b9d4455e94e3101a5eafa8ae.md), Supernatural (../Inspirations/Supernatural%20996146bcd7f043f0a2f91fe83c4321c0.md), Angel (../Inspirations/Angel%20e78051e24c8d47aaaa8b5d0bf7bf8d93.md), Buffy the Vampire Slayer (../Inspirations/Buffy%20the%20Vampire%20Slayer%20422117fdf7ea42638ab43a679e512d1b.md), Batman (1989) (../Inspirations/Batman%20(1989)%20136bf2ccc849460a914cad03bb8dc541.md), Neverwinter Nights (../Inspirations/Neverwinter%20Nights%20b1de5c0c474b4a9f96d7b652dcd30ece.md), Dark Souls (../Inspirations/Dark%20Souls%204126541b1c124056b5dff756778cdba2.md), X-Factor Investigations (../Inspirations/X-Factor%20Investigations%204496354c9e3f44f1939e87dd7ef8abf9.md), Watchmen (../Inspirations/Watchmen%200985cb49b57f4b60bc959cfc391e7176.md), H. P. Lovecraft (../Inspirations/H%20P%20Lovecraft%208b960aeb87da4d2c816e0219335869e4.md), Untitled (https://www.notion.so/0a76666792964c1bad46a2e5656ab62e?pvs=21), Batman Returns (../Inspirations/Batman%20Returns%20bb12768ac7c14b5ab55779aa3729e99c.md), Labyrinth (../Inspirations/Labyrinth%201d458e628ba280ba8976f66237b73d67.md), The Matrix (../Inspirations/The%20Matrix%2023058e628ba280c887e8f1e85aa43171.md), Aliens (../Inspirations/Aliens%2028c58e628ba2801a919ce41fb9a52aaa.md)
